Bash(python -c "import sys,json; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); c=data[0]; print\(json.dumps\({k:v for k,v in c.items\(\) if k not in \('features','spells_known_table','talents'\)}, indent=2\)\); print\(f'\\nTotal classes: {len\(data\)}'\); print\('All class names:'\); [print\(f'  - {x[\\"class\\"]}'\) for x in data]")

Bash(python -c "import sys,json; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); sources={}; [sources.setdefault\(c['source'],[]\).append\(c['class']\) for c in data]; [print\(f'{s} \({len\(v\)}\)'\) for s,v in sources.items\(\)]")

Bash(python -c "import sys,json; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(json.dumps\(data[0], indent=2\)\); print\(f'\\nTotal races: {len\(data\)}'\); sources={}; [sources.setdefault\(r.get\('source','?'\),[]\).append\(r['race']\) for r in data]; [print\(f'{s} \({len\(v\)}\)'\) for s,v in sources.items\(\)]")

Bash(python -c "import sys,json; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(json.dumps\(data[0], indent=2\)\); print\(f'\\nTotal spells: {len\(data\)}'\); casters=set\(\); [casters.add\(s.get\('Caster','?'\)\) for s in data]; print\('Casters:', sorted\(casters\)\); tiers=set\(\); [tiers.add\(s.get\('Tier','?'\)\) for s in data]; print\('Tiers:', sorted\(tiers\)\)")

Bash(python -c "import json; data=json.load\(open\('static/data/magic_items.json','r',encoding='utf-8'\)\); types=set\(\); [types.add\(m.get\('Type',''\) or m.get\('type',''\)\) for m in data]; print\(sorted\(types\)\)")
